insights.label: Value Creation
insights.title: The base case is positive, but not bulletproof.
insights.body: Base NPV is 1.63B USD and the project pays back in year 4. That is enough to justify attention, but not enough to skip downside framing.

insights.label: Tail Risk
insights.title: The left tail is the real portfolio story.
insights.body: Loss probability is 34.5%. The 5% VaR is -7.26B USD and the CVaR is -9.35B USD, which means adverse combinations are economically severe.

insights.label: Decision Signal
insights.title: Scenario spread reveals investment fragility.
insights.body: The strongest deterministic case is Bull Market at 4.91B USD, while Investment Committee Downside falls to -7.17B USD. The committee-downside case alone reaches -7.17B USD.
